mainEntity.name: Can New York employment lawyers get cited in AI Overviews for wrongful termination cases?
mainEntity.text: Can New York employment lawyers get cited in AI Overviews for wrongful termination cases?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, New York employment lawyers get cited by publishing NY-specific wrongful termination guides, timelines, and settlement data, leveraging E-E-A-T to compete in consumer-heavy AI results.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI Overviews pull from top pages; create detailed resources on NY Labor Law §740 claims. New York firms differentiate with case studies. Warning: Opposing parties monitor citations—ensure content accuracy to avoid liability.
